title: Hundert Tage
writer: Giovacchino Forzano, Benito Mussolini, Karl Vollmöller
actors: Werner Krauss, Gustaf Gründgens, Kurt Junker
plot: On February 26, 1815 Napoleon leaves his exile on Elba. He is marching with 1 000 men towards Paris to rebel against the conditions imposed by the Congress of Vienna.
